codeReview.summary: The feature delivers the transcribe CLI flow, storage collision fix, and broad test coverage, but it does not fully satisfy the stated exit-code contract for error cases. Partial batch failures still return exit code 0, which conflicts with the requirement of non-zero on error.

issues.description: Exit status is only non-zero when every file fails (`failed > 0 and completed == 0 and skipped == 0`). With mixed outcomes (e.g., one file fails and another succeeds/skips), the command exits 0 despite encountering errors. The feature spec requires non-zero on errors.

The Whisper model is loaded before checking whether any videos exist, so empty folders still incur model-load overhead before returning "No video files found". This is a UX/performance issue but does not block core functionality.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The backend-worker skill prescribes strict tests-first RED flow, but the worker transcript shows implementation edits preceding the new CLI test cycle. This mismatch appears recurrent for CLI-oriented features and suggests the skill procedure should be clarified to allow pragmatic ordering when needed.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/backend-worker/SKILL.md:28,32 require RED-first; worker-transcripts.jsonl entry for session 7b729807-6bce-4876-8d2c-5b443fb4b4ce shows storage/CLI edits before the dedicated RED check and handoff.skillFeedback suggests updating this guidance.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Architecture docs state CLI should remain a thin interface over shared pipeline logic, but transcribe batching/skip/error control flow is duplicated in CLI rather than delegated to shared transcription batch orchestration. AGENTS.md may need a clearer enforcement note to reduce drift from the architecture rule.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/library/architecture.md:64,95 describe thin interfaces; snipsnap/cli.py (commit 926b58b) lines 111-133 implement batch orchestration logic directly.

summary: Review of commit 926b58b found one blocking issue: partial transcription failures still return exit code 0, violating the feature’s non-zero-on-error requirement. A non-blocking UX issue (model loading before empty-folder check) is also present. Shared-state observations were recorded for skill-procedure clarity and architecture-convention enforcement.
